action_set_definitions.name: get_alert_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the core metadata and the list of pending investigative requirements for a specific AML alert.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier of the AML alert (e.g., AML-1024).

example_output.alert_metadata: Alert triggered by high-volume wire transfers.

action_set_definitions.name: get_entity_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed information about the customer or entity associated with the alert, including KYC details and risk factors.

entity_name.description: The name of the company or individual (e.g., 'Northstar Global').

action_set_definitions.name: resolve_pending_action
action_set_definitions.description: Clears a specific mandatory requirement from the pending actions queue of an investigation.

action_id.description: The specific ID of the action item to resolve.

resolution_note.description: A brief explanation of how the requirement was satisfied.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_sar_escalation
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the review, sets the risk rating and typology, and moves the alert to 'ESCALATED' status as a Suspicious Activity Report (SAR).

priority.description: Priority level for the SAR filing.

final_justification.description: Comprehensive summary of findings for regulatory submission.

state_description.alert_metadata: General information about the AML alert.
state_description.customer_context: Information about the primary subject of the alert.
state_description.investigation_history: Log of steps taken by the investigator in the current session.
state_description.pending_actions: List of required steps before the alert can be closed.

investigation_history: ML model (v2.1) auto-resolved alert as 'Low Risk' via hibernation logic.
Internal audit flagged this entity for potential 'Structuring' bypass due to $9,950 deposit patterns.
Quality Assurance marked the automated resolution as a 'False Negative' requiring manual override.
pending_actions: Document high-volume wire transfers for the last 30 days
Identify and verify Ultimate Beneficial Owner (UBO)
Perform SAR escalation for detected layering activity
